name: JUXTAGLOMERULAR CELL TUMOR
definition: RENINOMA very rare benign renin-secreting tumor

demographics.Histo: tumor resembles hemangiopericytoma composed of sheets / trabeculae of round to

dominant_finding: hypovascular mass on arterial phase ← renin-induced vascoconstriction
discriminating_features: hypovascular mass on arterial phase ← renin-induced vascoconstriction
hypointense mass relative to renal parenchyma on precontrast T1WI + T2WI
early low-level peripheral enhancement on T1WI

US: echogenic mass ± areas of necrosis / hemorrhage
CECT: hypovascular mass on arterial phase ← renin-induced vascoconstriction
MR: hypointense mass relative to renal parenchyma on precontrast T1WI + T2WI
early low-level peripheral enhancement on T1WI
washout of contrast material from periphery + filling in of central tumor portion on delayed
ANGIO: renal vein sampling yields high renin level on affected side
